reviews.review_description: I’m not kidding when I say this has to have one of  the most realistic badminton game for VR , it is so realistic and makes you feel as though your playing against a real competitor, of the three levels available I can’t get past hard level yet , she is too good and too fast but trying to beat the lady delivers a really good sweat inducing workout. Only draw back is you need a room big enough to fit the playing area.

reviews.review_title: Why i cant launch the game?
reviews.review_description: Why i stuck on the select user session? i cant even play the gamee...cmon what happen, i but racket  club too, its just blank and never go inside the game
UPDATE UPDATE UPDATE

reviews.review_title: Ok but … bad gamesmanship from AI
reviews.review_description:
Game is ok but the AI you play against are not pleasant - they mock they deliberately hit ball shuttlecock etc straight at you if they are losing.  The golf and bowling ones are wrong on many levels 
As I say game is good but would be better if you could play against other characters and if they were less patronising and nasty - bad gamesmanship does not teach children how sport should be played with determination but good grace given in defeat.

We have two Quest 3 headsets, and my kids and I play games against each other. Pickleball is my favorite, but my kids think hockey is fun because they can swing their controllers wildly fast and it makes it really hard to get a shot past them. Badminton is harder than it looks, it can be difficult to even hit the birdie.

First off, I want to say how much I truly enjoy your game! The gameplay is engaging, the mechanics are solid, and the overall experience is a lot of fun. It’s clear a lot of care and effort went into its design, and I’m excited to see how it continues to evolve.

Incredibly fun to play together with friends. Works online, but even better if you're in the same room. 

Every game in the collection is fun. I actually prefer the bowling game here to the other standalone bowling VR games.
It’s for fun the most of time but there are way too many bugs for example in the hockey mode I counted a lot of times where the puck just went over my stick and in my net

I love this game. The physics make it feel very lifelike. I enjoy that it is difficult. Others complain about this, but the difficulty is very close to the real games themselves which is a plus for me. I don't want it to be a piece of cake.

reviews.review_title: Great, but career comes up short
reviews.review_description: Overall very good, but needs a greater challenge. The five sports are done well- nice feel to each (not a true simulation of the sports). The career mode was nice, but way too short and easy to complete. I wish there was more to the career mode, but it was fun while it lasted. I love the mix reality and the fact that you know exactly where you are in the room so you can just swing away with no worries of hitting something.  Overall very happy with this purchase- I just want more… I never tried online (I think it would be fun with friends). https://youtu.be/Y6uLVQ0CfMQ?si=HvMrK8q9L9rB-V-y
I like the app, only problem I have is that In the description says " internet connection not required " , but can't play without internet ??   Hopefully someone can fix this problem

I've been playing only one time on this game since I bought it.

The game it's pretty boring and difficult to win in some sports that makes you loose interest very soon.

There's no personalisation at all, and there's something too arcade to make want to play again on this.

I feel stupid for not asking for the refund after the first and only time I played it.

How on earth have u made the collisions for the racquets this abysmal please tell me why the bot on easy is able to magnificently manoeuvre the shuttlecock but i lightly tap it and its gone to the North Pole to work in santas shop 🫩

Personally play only badminton in this game and always end of being sweaty which is great, the bots jump in difficulty from medium to hard quite fast so it is quite the challenge but I like it. 

I really wish tho this game had a stats page of all of the games you have played in each mode so you can get a better idea of how well you have improved over time, as I am treating this game for working out right now and it's great just wish it had this feature.

Having stats like the win to loss ratio, how many errors or faults you have made, how many hours you have put into each mode, how many hits, serves, over arm, under arm hits you have done total would be nice. 

Sometimes the game will stutter when the bot is serving or hitting but isn't a huge issue in my opinion.

great game ,but please add more games (archery,fencing ,maybe YouTube music support. )it will be a huge success if it gets this. I would also be happy with Hungarian subtitles! Add please amvr golf attachment  and 5 star

So the game loses tracking when you go to bowl the ball. Apparently it wasnt made to measure by controller orientation but by headset camera? For whatever reason when the ball is behind your back the game panics and launches the ball directly into the gutter. You’d have to roll it like a robot perfectly still and straight to get it to go properly. It literally loses the ball when you wind it behind you back before rolling it down the lane. I don’t think the game was made with the understanding of spin with bowling balls. 

Wii Sports had this solved in 2006. If you try and correct for the bad motion translation in the bowling game it sends the ball down a gutter on the other side. So it’s not about bowling how you would in real life, this game can’t do that, you have to learn how the game thinks you should bowl the ball, it’s about bowling like you’re a stiff mannequin and your arms have no joints. You can’t curve the bowling ball because again, during the motion of bowling the ball the game wasn’t programmed to know what the ball is doing when it’s behind your back. The “assist” mode is simply bumper bowling, it’s not a real assist, it’s the laziest handicap for the game not having physics as complex as a Nintendo Wii minigame from 2006. Bowling balls spin, developers never looked into this. 

The presentation of the game is great but not a lot of work went into the games. As others mention because the games are robotic and the controls don’t match up well to the games, nobody bothers playing online. Home Sports is not getting updates, we know its take it or leave it so many left. Some of the games are better than others but this is not the sports game for bowling or mini golf fans.
disapointment. Devs forget about this game

reviews.review_title: Tennis we need and basketball hoop
reviews.review_description: Great game art and graphics are on point ... Let's replace hockey with tennis and basketball... But this has. A wii sports feel but yah.  Let's do it guys .. some one else said the same thing over all   the game is welcoming and fun  friendly vibes ...        And I'm so happy everything is multiplayer and I'm glad that I grabbed it at a terrific price. Playing the demo in this I saw it on sale and grabbed it right up no regrets...

reviews.review_title: Great game, but online is dead.
reviews.review_description: Home Sports is an ambitious mixed reality sports collection that brings pickleball, hockey, bowling, mini golf, and badminton into your living space with impressive passthrough. The gameplay is intuitive, the visuals are vibrant, and the mechanics feel natural, making it a solid addition to the VR sports genre. However, despite its engaging design, the multiplayer scene is eerily quiet, leaving players with AI opponents rather than real competition. If you're looking for a solo sports experience, it's a great pick—but if you crave online matchups, id play with friends, as the online multiplayer is dead.

reviews.review_title: Best Game on the App Store (NOT ANYMORE)
reviews.review_description:
This is easily the best sports game avaliable in vr right now and to boot it's free , I would gladly pay 15-25 $ for it  its worth it.
The realism allows me to get a good workout at home without having to physically go to the courts always. Each game takes a little time getting used to but after a little practice once you get the hang of it  it's incredible .
I've played over 20 sports games on quest and none hold a.candle to this .
My only request would be to add some form of tennis even if it's a miniature one .
Probably the only one minus point is Ice hockey , it's not properly designed,  you may want to stay away from that one.
Badminton is flawless. 
Fantastic game with a few flaws , no game is perfect .
Edit: I have no idea what they did to it , it isn't good anymore , too much lag and physics don't match , Gameplay is no longer good , can avoid

reviews.review_title: Scratched up my headset playing this
reviews.review_description:
I hate this game. I consider myself pretty decent at racket sports, but I couldn’t beat the BEGINNER LEVEL bot. I tried so hard. Countless beads of sweat rolled down my face as I busted my BUTT to try and beat the freaking starter level badminton bot. 

To set the scene, I was about to score my first ever point. I was giving it my all. I lunged forward with all my might, about to hit an epic return on a quote despicable serve from the bot’s end. Due to the amount of raw, bitter determination I had channeling through my body, I overshot and rammed my 48 hour old new headset into the wall. Thankfully the mechanics were unharmed, but I will forever have a stupid ugly scratch on my headset from this stupid ugly game. 

I cannot recommend playing this unless you’ve got a vendetta against yourself.

I love the game it’s really fun but only until I got to a point in the career mode. I’m at the point where I have to play badminton and I start 7-0 and that’s where it stopped being fun. I’ve lost 20 games in a row against her and I’m on the verge of tears. It says kids can play it too but it’s really hard. If you could make it where if you lose 5 in a row she starts going really easy on you then I’ll play it more but for now I probably won’t play it. And also she hits it to a point where if I go to hit it then I’ll run in to things even when the play space is the smallest. Please fix your game.

This game simulates the sports well. Especially badminton. Keep coming back just for that and bowling. I just hope the players pose more of a challenge. Most of the players online are trash. But Expert mode with the AI is decent. This needs a leader board, skins, and tournaments to be a 5 star for me.

reviews.review_title: Stuck in the startup selection user
reviews.review_description: You can’t play without the Internet. You are stuck in the selection interface. You can‘t continue by clicking all the buttons.

I like badminton the most. The vibration on controller you feel and sound of shuttlecock hitting your racket are just perfect. Physic in game well done. Playing against bot at hardest level is a good moderate workout. Give it 4 star, can improve if add in storyline or career mode where u face different bot opponents for single player.

This game is basically soulless you can't even pause the game, no records of matches won, no leaders board no full mix reality it's a freaking portal, no physical interaction with the equipments and bots are so dumb, wrist adjustment is complex, you can't hit the bot with the ball it just basically goes through the bot no updates, you can't even buy stuff, all equipments are default, you can't upgrade your equipments or change your environment, bots are too chunky and no commentary, no net's heights adjustments everything is basically default and no reply on reviews.

I love the idea with the portal since I can move more than in other games without being scared. There is just a few things I really would love if the developers changed it.
- less loading times and faster start into the game
- pausing a game and other convenient features
- for the bowling move the floor a bit to the player because I am scared to hit the wall 😅

But overall, great!

reviews.review_title: This has the potential to be Wii Sports
reviews.review_description:
First let's address the elephant in the room... The fact the Mixed Reality is a portal... Having a setting to make it where you just got the court placed down instead of a portal would be excellent. Add leader boards because people love breaking records. Those are my only issues with the game.

Things I like.
I love the ability to have these sports within the comfort of my yard (I use my quest 3 at night to avoid UV damage)
I love how fluid the motions are and how fun it is to move irl to play the sports.

Remove portals and you get 4 stars. We want the courts in our yard/house.

Add leader boards as well and you get 5 stars. Simple as that.

Great game! Reminds me of Wii Sports. Nice, simple games to play with a friend. 

We keep coming back to pickle ball and bowling the most. But ice hockey and badminton are good too. Mini golf we don’t play because Walkabout is the king.

I'm very surprised that the average rating at the time of writing this is 3.9. I've thoroughly explored all the games with a friend and I really enjoyed it. It's simple fun! I was just recommending this game as a great way to highlight the power of the Quest 3 when I noticed the lower than expected rating and that compelled me to swing this back in the other direction. This is an arcade style sports game with a focus on fun. It really reminds me of Wii Sports. If you like Wii Sports, this is the one for you.
It's a good game for parties and family fun or even for a small club. Me and 6 other friends has this game, and we all play all the time.

The avatars in this game are so bad they are actually scary to play against. Once again the devs deliver the creepiest group of people to play against just like with their other sports game Racket Club. If the games were good I could live with that but even with assist mode off the ball games just feel off, the physics are just not quite there. It feels like they are over controlled to make the games work. Same goes for Racket Club. It makes both games feel like you are playing with solid rubber balls. Hit things as hard as you like but they go the same speed. All games just feel like you are playing to see who makes a mistake rather than who wins a point
A few simple  games, but with a friend it's a brilliant game, we've played badminton and pickleball in the garden, the only sports game where you can physically move, brilliant.
No

Especially badminton is a Lot of fun!
However, the AI could be more challenging. Will there be an update to the badminton AI in the foreseeable future?

This game is fun, but there is so much that needs to happen to make it really good.  Allow us to skip the dialogue.  Change the characters.  They are goons and look maniacal.  In the careers, let us retry a game instead of restarting the entire level. The mechanics are great.  The passthrough play makes it so nice and safe.  Just evolve this game a bit to make it more approachable and engaging for adults.
I just downloaded this game today and been trying to find a server but since barely anyone plays this game I can't load in to a single match but really good game.
The use of the N word is extremely inappropriate and should not be tolerated when interacting with other users.

developer_response.body: We are sorry to hear about your experience. The use of racial slurs is completely unacceptable and has no place in our games. This is strictly against our Terms of Service, which all players agree to when joining the game. Please help us keep the community safe by reporting any players engaging in such behavior.

reviews.review_description: Have had literally the most amazing experiences playing with my young son. We've laughed so hard and had the best time yet..that is when I'm able to start the local match with him. Playing from the same residencein not sure what I'm doing wrong. He's on a child account with all permissions enabled. I've only been able to play with him less then 20 percent of the time.. plz help because like I said we love this game

Previously 4 stars, was quite enjoyable.

But now, after new updates from both the game and meta, the game is just too choppy and laggy, the image is jittery and blurry.
 
And this is playing with AI, so no heavy requirement on network signals like playing with human.

The game is unplayable now. They have a discord server but the devs aren't responsive at all. All issues/bug reports are sent into oblivion.

One star for the short amount of time I had playing this game. Now since it is unplayable and not refundable, could have been zero star.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear about the trouble! We actually haven’t updated the game recently—this issue is due to a recent Meta system update, which enabled Battery Saver mode by default, causing performance drops like jitter and blurriness. Meta is already rolling out a backend fix to address this. In the meantime, try turning off Battery Saver in Settings > Power. We appreciate your patience and hope it improves soon!

reviews.review_description:
Home Sports" is a textbook example of a game that almost nails the concept—but ultimately fumbles the execution. There’s something undeniably exciting about stepping into a mixed reality space and playing sports like badminton in your backyard or living room. And to be fair, when the game works, it really works—especially the badminton. It feels great, responsive, and shockingly fun in MR. It’s the kind of experience that makes you wish every VR game was this interactive.

But then the rest ..

Let’s start with the dialogues. They're pointless. They drag. And worst of all, there’s no skip button. Just tap-tap-tap your way through lines like “haha,” “yeah,” and “yeey” as your enthusiasm steadily deflates. Even more confusing—you can replay these hollow exchanges afterwards? Why?

Then there’s the physics, or lack thereof. There’s no spin on balls, no sense of weight or momentum. In some modes, the ball just clips through bots like they’re holograms—because, well, they sort of are. You’re not interacting with a world as much as hovering above it, tapping at the surface.

The single-player mode is basically an unskippable tutorial disguised as gameplay. It lacks challenge, competition, or even basic game mechanics like tracking your wins. You can’t pause. You can’t adjust much. It’s like the game was built to be watched, not played.
Yet despite all this… I keep coming back for the badminton. It’s so much fun, especially
 in mixed reality. I set up a large outdoor space, and it genuinely feels fresh every time I play. If only the rest of the game lived up to that standard. There’s clearly potential here—maybe even greatness—but it’s buried under half-baked design decisions and a lack of polish.

Final verdict? Worth trying for the badminton—but expect frustration elsewhere. Here’s hoping the devs double down and give this game the update it deserves.

reviews.review_title: way too unrealistic and exaggerated hits
reviews.review_description: If you want a realistic and fun experience in racket sports, this is NOT the game for you. The racket is offset in a way so every hit you make is directed to the left or right. The physics are so weird and in pickleball, the ball bounces so badly so that you can't ever rely on bounce shots. The shuttlecock in badminton goes through the racket often. The game just makes you make mistakes.
You Schmucks you're all Schmucks

I used to play badminton in college in a class and we were all super competitive. This seems so realistic with the feel of the birdie hitting the racquet and the way it flies. My muscle memory came back and my back hands, smashes and soft hits all react just right. Plus I make the same stupid errors.

Please make a harder mode than expert!

I let my wife try who never plays with me, and we played for hours. We took it to my sister in laws to play local multiplayer, and her and her fiance bought headsets that day so we can all plat together. PLEASE  add MORE SPORTS soon...like valley ball or dodge ball...or more mini golf courses.

It's a great sports game, but could it have a non-mixed reality mode where you can move around with joysticks, because my area is small and I love this game, makes it more space friendly and add MORE SPORTS just 5 sports is boring add something like table tennis. Also fix where the birdie or ball doesn't go through the dang racket when hitting, made me look terrible when playing badminton and pickle ball on easy because it kept glitching through the racket!
Really like the way the games play. Like hockey being a mix of hockey and table hockey. Very fun. Bots are well done and balanced. Multiplayer with family is great. Recommend.

The game is very good, especially the badminton can't stop at all, it's fantastic. But there are 2 issues that would like to be improved. 1: Now it's time to match players first and then select a sport, resulting in two players potentially wanting to play a different sport. 2: I hope there is an icon that matches the player's level, because if the matched players have a big difference in level, it will be very boring to fight.

Just purchased a Meta Quest 3s and VR and Mixed Reality gaming is an entirely new experience for me. I'm so happy I downloaded this game and can't stop playing it. I've been playing pickleball for the last couple of years, recreationally and in tournaments, and I find the gameplay mechanics and physics to be realistic, enjoyable, and, best of all, a great workout. I enjoy the drilling mode and the single player experience as well. I really could not be happier. The only other sports I tried were hockey and bowling. The hockey experience (practice drills) impressed me, but I found bowling very difficult and awkward for some reason. I'm looking forward to trying the golf game. I probably will stick to pickleball over badminton. I hope the developers have great success with this title, and I am writing this to highly recommend this game and support the developers.
Dimensions are mediocre and too broad. Otherwise okay, not scam game.

The game kind of reminds me of Wii Sports, or what Wii Sports wanted to be. This game is a silly but fun game to play. Great game to break out for new people trying VR for the first time. I would not say any of the sports are overall realistic, but the handling in all of them feels natural and easy to pick up, which makes it fun. I like the animation style. It's a fun party game if you know more people. Has a variety of sports. There are of course better standalone games out there on the store for most of these games that are more real. But this still plays great, and I'll jump into this here and there.
feels like real sport. my best is badminton. highly recommended.

I've played other games in VR, but mixed reality is a game-changing feature.  Other similar games follow the Nintendo Wii model of quickly locating your avatar to a location where the ball has gone.  This game makes you physically run to the ball with a safe view of your environment, so you are getting real exercise.   There is a small startup Facebook page called HomeSports partner Locator that will be great for matching up like-minded people looking for a  match.
Hello it says not avaible

This is a fun game , I wish there was more players online to match with though.  It took awhile for me to match anyone to play badminton and pickleball.  The only two matches I had  kids. …. If anyone wants to play sometime please add me ! Username steevonator

reviews.review_title: 5 Stars for the Hockey and Golf
reviews.review_description: Yes Walkabout Mini Golf is better but Walkabout mini golf doesn’t give you A.I. opponents to go against which in my opinion is a big deal same for Hockey it may not be the best or feel super realistic but in my opinion it’s close enough, the game is at a good price for what it’s, the graphics are great, mixed reality is easy to set up. Easy, Simple, Fun. 5 Stars

reviews.review_title: Nice MR tech style but little thing
reviews.review_description: I like it , i hope lil more regular games like table tennis and normal tennis , but there is little thing need to adjust , that is when play mini golf , imo most part of golf area should be in the screen thingy and prevent it to be most of it out world , so if the ball reaches near hole , the play area should turned to be the other sise of golf area gets in the screen  not goes long at outer world and and most likely gets collides with outerworld objects
It won’t let me launch it…….
As a frequent badminton player I thought I’d give this a go. Almost impossible to hit the shuttle, nothing like the real game. Seemed like a good concept if they can improve the execution
Fantastic game

I received this through quest +. Wasn't too thrilled at first, it didn't make me feel like a sports superstar. Badminton dragged me in because I am that bad in real life, I knew it didn't matter that the racket was virtual or real, cause the shuttle passes straight through it either way lol. Now I can beat Gale straight sets every time on easy hehehe. Recently started on career mode, but that wasn't what I was expecting. I guess the career they are talking about is sports club owner??.
Weird

the game is fun but my headset is bricked whenever i the game up. after the whole logo stuff pops up im stuck in pass through and cant close the app without turning the headset off and back on again. i only have 30 minutes played and they are refusing to give me a refund

reviews.review_title: HOME SPORTS IS MY FIRST PURCHASE !
reviews.review_description:
HOME SPORTS HAS BEEN REFERRED TO AS THE “ WII SPORTS “ OF META QUEST . THIS IS DELIGHTFULLY TRUE AND WAS MY FIRST META QUEST PURCHASE ALONG WITH MY AWESOME “ BATMAN ARKAM SHADOW “ GAME !
 SO MUCH TO DO , YOU’LL BE PLEASANTLY SURPRISED AT THE QUALITY OF ALL THE HAPPY POSSIBILITIES , ENJOY !!

Switching between pitching and hitting would be a perfect combo for this games setup. Not sure if fielding could ever be involved but like all the other modes pitching and hitting would be smooth. 

Are other sports coming??

As everyone knows one of the biggest sports in these kind of games is bowling... I spent 3 hours of my life in practice mode trying to hit a strike, I hit the middle every time, the ball kept respawning and now I'm probly going to going to smash something, also all thw other sports or utter dog water. In short, the physics in this are mushy Brussel sprots that have been COVERED in salt and where just thrown in the bin and are now being dug out and served to you on a plat that has mold.

Its such a great game and its awesome being able to see my surroundings, so i can actually play the sport without constantly worrying ill hit something . The only real complaint i have is the fact you cant change your background and have different venues to play at . But thats not a real complaint. Thank you resolution games.
Worst mechanics in a vr game of all time so bad ball goes through racket ball ricochet very weirdly don’t spend the money it’s not worth it it’s the worst game I’ve had

Im primarily writing this review to push the average rating above 4.0 in meta store because this the rating the game deserves AT LEAST. The current 3.9 really does the game no justice. 

Coming from racket club, one immediately recognises the design language of the same dev studio + what I feel like is heavily inspired by Wii Sports. 

Games are solid and fun, especially pickleball. I like it even more here than in RacketClub. I also like how they solved the play space settings in comparison to racketclub. Big plus for ease of use including setting floor height in game!! In RC you needed to do that in quest settings while recalibrating boundary which was a hassle. 

And honestly for 10€ with a creator discount this is a no brainer for me. Already put in 90min on first use and had a blast in the garden with maximum movement, which makes pickleball very fun and sweaty! Maybe skip Uber eats once on Friday and buy this game, I think it’s worth it. 

Personally I also can’t understand why so many people are bothered with the portal function. I think it’s great use of mixed reality technology. I didn’t miss full VR a second. I also play racket club with Portal all the time, never in VR. I think it’s a great compromise. What do people expect of full MR with no portal tho? You need the visual contrast for the games and personally Id rather have my opponent in a portal than hovering somewhere in a garden bush where I can barely see his movements. 

Anyway one thing I’d love as an improvement would be to make the pickleball wall a practice feature! So you can play infinitely against the pickle wall without timer or target training, just free casual play :)
Game has been running crystal clear, smooth as silk, last 3 days. Thank you

MR is perfect for sports titles and this one is just amazing since i can see my room i dont hit anything and u can increase decrease size of the court depending on the space you have.

Badminton and Pickleball both r amazing.
It keeps asking for oculus latest update. Not sure if it is supposed to work with quest 3

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you are experiencing issues. Make sure your headset have enough memory available to keep up to date with oculus software updates. The game should be compatible with Quest 3. Let us know if you still experience issues.

reviews.review_title: Don't know if I like it or hate it
reviews.review_description: The in game physics are horrible. As a hockey player I can say that their recreation of hockey is downright disgraceful.

Do not play this game if you are inside, you physically will not win against opponents and it is extremely hard to do. ONLY get this game if you can use it somewhere outside of your home. This game is terrible for indoors DO NOT GET IT.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback. We’re sorry to hear you had a frustrating experience playing indoors. The game is designed to be flexible for different environments with adjustable playspace settings, but we understand it can be challenging in certain spaces.

We’re always working to improve gameplay across all settings, if you have any specific suggestions, feel free to reach us out at (support@resolutiongames.com)

reviews.review_title: Glad I didn't pay for it
reviews.review_description: I lasted 3 minutes before it got too infuriating to play. Started with badminton, which I apparently need to be about 3ft tall for to be able to return serves, and the shuttlecock just kept disappearing every time I picked it up. Not a good game.

This game is underrated, its from the dev of Racket Club. It is a more accessible version, since you can't spin the ball. But the badminton is much better, plus the other sports are nice, challenges are fun. If you have two headset (Quest 3 or 3s) local mixed reality multiplayer mode is where it shines the most, no more 3D avatars. Small request: Please give us an option to go full mixed reality mode in single player aswell. TY
Hockey, seems no matter how hard swing it doesn't go faster than a average swing. Same with some other games. Hope for some updates
I played a lot of Badminton in highschool and every summer, I love the badminton and pickleball!  Don't change a thing!!
My racket hits the ball and it just goes thru it don't waste ur money
Well done, made expert mode, but still easy to play badminton. Please, developers, make the game of badminton even more difficult. I give 5 stars in advance.
